description: Root dashboard.json is the aggregated summary consumed by dashboard.md, GitHub Pages, future Web Dashboard, and GyroOS Dashboard. Detailed source data is stored under data/*.json.

generation_policy.principle: data/*.json contains structured source data; root dashboard.json contains display-ready aggregate summary.
